response:
To compute the **sample variance** of the data set:

$$
\{-22, 22, 11, -19, 8, 7\}
$$

---

### Step 1: Find the sample mean ($\bar{x}$)

$$
\bar{x} = \frac{-22 + 22 + 11 - 19 + 8 + 7}{6}
$$

$$
\bar{x} = \frac{1}{6} = \frac{1}{6}
$$

---

### Step 2: Compute the squared differences from the mean

$$
(-22 - \frac{1}{6})^2 = \left(-\frac{133}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{17689}{36}
$$
$$
(22 - \frac{1}{6})^2 = \left(\frac{133}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{17689}{36}
$$
$$
(11 - \frac{1}{6})^2 = \left(\frac{65}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{4225}{36}
$$
$$
(-19 - \frac{1}{6})^2 = \left(-\frac{115}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{13225}{36}
$$
$$
(8 - \frac{1}{6})^2 = \left(\frac{47}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{2209}{36}
$$
$$
(7 - \frac{1}{6})^2 = \left(\frac{41}{6}\right)^2 = \frac{1681}{36}
$$

---

### Step 3: Sum the squared differences

$$
\text{Sum of squares} = \frac{17689 + 17689 + 4225 + 13225 + 2209 + 1681}{36}
$$

$$
\text{Sum of squares} = \frac{47382}{36}
$$

---
